name: Petra

base_stats.notable: Symmetric Attack/Defense/Health ratios (3330/3330/33300). Gen 3 introduces higher Expedition scaling (290.23% vs Gen 1-2's 200-240%).

conquest.name: Dichotomy
conquest.description: Petra throws a tarot card at an enemy, dealing damage with a random effect of either reducing target's Attack by 20% for 2 seconds OR stunning for 1.5 seconds.

conquest.name: Change of Fate
conquest.description: Petra curses an enemy, dealing floating damage within a range. Base value is scaled, final damage fluctuates between 5% and 600% of base.
conquest.mechanic_note: Floating damage — unique to Petra. Final output fluctuates widely.

conquest.name: Turn Card
conquest.description: Petra reverses misfortune by healing the friendly hero with the lowest percentage of Health remaining. Heal amount floats between 5% and 400% of base.

expedition.name: Evil Eye
expedition.description: 50% chance of cursing the target, increasing damage taken.

expedition.name: The Favor
expedition.description: 50% chance of increasing all squads' Attack.

expedition.name: The Shield
expedition.description: 40% chance of reducing damage taken for all squads.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Weighted Deck
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the upper and lower limit of Petra's fluctuating skills. This directly boosts Change of Fate and Turn Card's randomized damage/healing ranges. Unlocked only when Fate's Writ is equipped.
exclusive_gear_skills.mechanic_note: This is a unique synergy mechanic — directly amplifies her other skill outputs.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Cosmic Eye
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Attack of rallied troops. Unlocked only when Fate's Writ is equipped.

exclusive_gear.name: Fate's Writ
exclusive_gear.notes: Gen 3 heroes get higher exclusive gear power (315,000 vs Gen 1-2's 225,000-270,000) and higher Expedition percentages (70% vs 50-60%).

order: Then The Shield / The Favor for proc-based rallies
Exclusive gear Weighted Deck amplifies chance-based skills

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard cavalry archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

lineup_inferences.note: Add Petra as cavalry rally lead. Zoe and Marlin remain core.
Petra continues providing cavalry rally value even in late game.

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Petra's floating damage mechanic makes her highly variable — great when you have Fate's Writ equipped (which boosts the range). Her high base stats (all 3330/3330/33300 pattern) plus cavalry rally capability makes her the F2P cavalry cornerstone from Gen 3 onward.
best_partners.source: kingshotguides.com + lootbar.gg + kingshotmastery.com (community consensus lineup guides)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: Often featured in Hero Roulette events, making her accessible to F2P players who save gold keys. 3 F2P access methods.

rally.reasoning: Premier F2P cavalry rally lead. Often featured in events.

lore_background.title: The Great Diviner
lore_background.backstory: Petra is a 14-year-old fortune-teller from the royal diviners' guild, famously known as 'The Great Diviner.' She once emptied an entire gambling establishment's coffers through sheer predictive accuracy — a feat that caught the attention of General Cesares, whom she impressed with her prophecies before departing King's Castle. Her readings follow strict personal rituals: she avoids garlic, demands specific meals before divinations, and treats her own fate with the same precision she applies to others'.

deep_analysis: Petra is the F2P cavalry rally lead of Kingshot — a Gen 3 Legendary with a completely unique mechanical identity built around FLOATING DAMAGE. Where every other hero has fixed scaling values, Petra's Change of Fate and Turn Card deal damage and healing that fluctuates within a wide range (5% to 600% of base for Change of Fate, 5% to 400% of base for Turn Card). Her Conquest tree: Dichotomy throws a tarot card dealing up to Attack × 378% damage with a random effect (20% Attack reduction OR stun). Change of Fate curses enemies with floating damage. Turn Card heals the weakest ally with floating amounts. Her Expedition tree provides squad-wide buffs: Evil Eye has a 50% chance to amplify enemy damage taken by up to 50%, The Favor has a 50% chance to increase squad Attack by up to 50%, and The Shield has a 40% chance to halve incoming squad damage. Her exclusive gear Fate's Writ is the most interesting gear mechanic documented so far: its Weighted Deck skill directly amplifies the upper and lower limits of her fluctuating skills by up to 150% — transforming her from a chaotic wild card into a reliably high-rolling powerhouse. Fate's Writ also adds +630 Attack, +630 Defense, +6300 Health, +70% Lethality, and +70% Health at max level. Community tier lists place her at S-tier Rally — the F2P cavalry cornerstone. She's accessible through Hero Roulette (rotating F2P pool), Mythic General Hero Shard, and Swordland Shop. Her lore makes her one of the game's most charming characters: a 14-year-old royal diviner who once emptied a gambling den's coffers by reading fate itself, impressed a general with her prophecies, and refuses to do readings without her ritual meal — and absolutely no garlic.

effect_op_codes.description: First cavalry widget rally leader — chance-based skills with Weighted Deck amplification
